description: S44R - Background notifications using flutter_local_notifications. Create notification service with initialize(), showTaskComplete(), showResearchComplete(), showTokenWarning(), requestPermission(). Create notification_ids.dart with static IDs. Update main.dart and chat_screen.dart.
steps: Add flutter_local_notifications: ^17.2.2 to frontend/pubspec.yaml under dependencies (after shared_preferences).
Create frontend/lib/core/utils/notification_ids.dart with a class NotificationIds containing static const int values: taskComplete = 1, researchComplete = 2, tokenWarning = 3, general = 100.

Create frontend/lib/data/services/notification_service.dart with class NotificationService containing: static final FlutterLocalNotificationsPlugin _plugin; static Future<void> initialize() to set up plugin with Android/iOS/macOS settings; static Future<void> showTaskComplete(String taskName) to show notification with title 'Task Complete' and body; static Future<void> showResearchComplete(String topic) with title 'Research Ready'; static Future<void> showTokenWarning(int percentUsed) with title 'Token Usage Warning'; static Future<bool> requestPermission() to request notification permission. All methods should have try/catch error handling. Use NotificationIds for IDs.

Update frontend/lib/main.dart: Import notification_service.dart. Change main() to async, add WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized() before runApp, call await NotificationService.initialize() before runApp.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/chat/chat_screen.dart: Import notification_service.dart. Add logic that when isStreaming transitions from true to false (AI response complete) and the app lifecycle is paused/inactive, call NotificationService.showTaskComplete('AI Response'). Use WidgetsBindingObserver mixin on _ChatScreenState to track app lifecycle state.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/lib/data/services/notification_service.dart exists with all 5 methods (initialize, showTaskComplete, showResearchComplete, showTokenWarning, requestPermission)
chat_screen.dart fires notification when AI response completes while app is backgrounded
verification: Run: cd frontend && flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos 2>&1 | tail -20
